title: Delicate Salty Ukrainian Mackerel Pilaf
description: A traditional Ukrainian dish featuring mackerel, score-fat, and low-calorie-friendly ingredients, perfect for a weeknight dinner. This recipe is salty, silky, and full of flavor.

ingredients.name: mackerel fillets
ingredients.notes: canned in water, drained and flaked

instructions: Heat the score-fat in a large saucepan over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until softened, about 3 minutes.
Add the grated carrot and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
Add the brown rice and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add the chicken broth, salt, black pepper, and dried dill, and bring to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low, cover, and simmer for 18 minutes.
Flake the mackerel into the saucepan and stir to combine.
Cook for an additional 2 minutes, or until the mackerel is heated through.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh dill if desired.
